title: achillea aizoon
intro: Achillea aizoon, also known as mountain yarrow or yarrow chamissonis, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae and native to the mountainous regions of the Pacific Northwest. The medicinal properties of Achillea aizoon include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, which have been used for centuries to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as its use in skincare products for its anti-aging and antioxidant properties. Achillea aizoon can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, or used as a topical oil or salve for its medicinal benefits.
